examples: Objective To know the mechanisms of treating dentine hypersensitivity by ns Paint.
Found in the scales of Palaeozoic fishes as a superficial layer over a dentine structure.
AIM: to observe the effects of treatment on hypersensitive dentine by semi-conductor laser.
It can be extremely painful, especially if it is extensive enough to wear through the enamel and expose the dentine and tooth pulp underneath.
In the most serious cases the enamel is worn away to such an extent that the dentine (the substance that comprises the bulk of the tooth) or even the pulp (the root) of the tooth are exposed.
